query: SELECT id, accessToken IS NOT NULL as has_access_token, refreshToken IS NOT NULL as has_refresh_token, expiresAt, businessName, locationName, createdAt, updatedAt FROM google_oauth_tokens ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4URdbyUXkTLuAyd.1068bf1d0e22 --database PymCzDCnSJzPjdkfwA7Jn6 --execute SELECT id, accessToken IS NOT NULL as has_access_token, refreshToken IS NOT NULL as has_refresh_token, expiresAt, businessName, locationName, createdAt, updatedAt FROM google_oauth_tokens ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
